S.FORM: == Koroasiya == Takaray a sowal O Koroasiya Kapolongan Kitakit itiraay i kalala'edean katimol no sakawali no Yoropa, Sifo'ay-Riyar ato -ParkanPecihkanatal, o Cecaay-Lomaocan a Kapolongan kitakit.o syoto ato sakakaay niyaro' o Cakoroypo , itiraay I ka'amis no saka'etipan no Koroasiya Kapolongan Kitakit, i sakatimol 'apilis no Mitowinica-Lotok, ira ko Sawa-'Alo mihifalat a romakat tona kitakit. I 2011 miheca a pisa'osi to tamdaw nona kitakit, Cakoroypo syoto ira ko 792,875 ko tamdaw. o polong i,ira ko 1,110,517 ko tamdaw. o dengan koni ko cirafasay to cecay so'ot ko ofad ko tamdaw sakakaay Tokay. itiya ho o mikapotay to Solin kona kitakit.Yo matekop ko Solin i 1990 miheca, liyas sanay to Solin a misiiked. I 1094 miheca satapang sa ira i nitilidan ko ngangan no Kakoroypo, itira i sakowan no Kapotor-Sikyo Etal .i 1845 miheca malatapang no Kakoroypo ci Yanko-Kamaofu,ikor to sa'aloman sato ko tamdaw i 1945 miheca , sakakahad sato kona niyaro a tokay, orasaka, malasyoto no Koroasiya kona Cakorpo.Polong no sekalay a sera i 56,594 km² ,saka 127 ko rayray no ngangan. O sekalay no sera i, 55,974 km², no nanom a sekalay i, 620 km² Ona Cakorpo a tokay pakitinien i kasasikiked a sakowan iraay ko pisiikedan nona tokay(Sakakaay Sifo Sakowan),i laloma' masakilac ho to 17 a etal, sahetoay i la'enoay no nani tongroh no riyar a tata'eman no Sawa-'Alo.(saowacan) O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Zoran Milanović, patirengan a romi'ad i 2020 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 19 a romi'ad. O kacacefelisan no lalan no 'edef no Korosiya kitakit, Sa'etipay-Yoropa, Sifo'ay Riyar ato Katimol-Saka'etipay a Yoropa ko kaitiraan no Cakoroypo tokay, orasaka, nani tini ko Kalokitakit-Cinamalay, ira ko cinamalay i laloma' nona tokay.o pitoooran nona kitakit sahetoay o tinsikyo. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 8 a romi'ad. Papikedan no Ngangan no kitakit O sa'ayaway a mapahadakay to "Koroasiya" sanay i,itiraay i taliyok no "Polanimir-Nitilidan Sikipan" , matilid itini ko Sifo'ay-Sici a Latin-Tilid to mikowanay to "Koroasiya"a honti ci Polanir Kakita'an, talacowa away ho pakalaheciay a somowal to lo'elinay a mihecaan, nikawrira, kafana'ay to yo mikowan ci Polanir to Koroasiya itiraay i 879 miheca tahira i 892 mihecaan, O "Korasiya" hananay i,nani tilid no Selafo tora "Xrovat-" ona tilid tonini o nani to'asan ho a tilid no Selafo to "*Xъrvatъ", "*xъrvatъ" ano ca "*Xŭrvatŭ" a ngiha' ko ni alaan. O kasadakan nona sowal away to ko kafana'an,nikawrira, o nani sowal no Koto-Finacadan, oya malahedaway to a sowal no Rireman-Finacadan ,ano ca o capa' a sowal no Indo-Yalian, matenak tara i Selafo-Finacadan a macaliw. O sa'ayaway mitelekay tona pitahidang o matiliday i Paska-Sikipang Tilid a "Toerpimir-Koroasiya honti"(zvъnъmirъ kralъ xrъvatъskъ) sanay a sowal. O sa'ayaway tono Latin a tilid to "Koroasiya" sanay a nitilidan i,itiyaay i 852 miheca to piahi ni Torpimir Kakita'an a nitilidan, oya padakopak(tatipelok)masidayay to, iraay ko mirorodan a tatipelok i 1568 miheca, nikawrira, ira ko caay ka pakaso'elin a tamdaw tonini a tatipelok. O pipangangan a mihongyaku i,ono Taywan a sowal "Koroaysiya" , ono Sinkapor ato Congko o "Korociya" hananay, ono Dipon i, malecad o "Korociya" hananay ko pangangan. Rikisi To'asan tahira i Sasifo'an Sici O aniniay a Koroasiya I'ayaway-Rikisi('ayaw no kairaan no tilid a rikisi) iraay to ko tamdaw a maro' itini tona palapalaan. Isaka'amisan nona kitakit ira a makera Katelangay-Fokelohan (i'ayaw no 260~250 'ofad ko mihecaan) a malafokelohay 'okak a fongoh no Niantota-Tamdaw(尼安德塔人;學名:Homo neanderthalensis), o itiraay i Kolapina a makarkaray ko sakakaay. I'ayaw ni Yieso to saka8 sici,o to'asan a Kirisiya tamdaw pasira i Kahetingay-Riyar, Sifo'ay-Riyar ato lawac no Yatoliya-Riyar mipatireng to sakowan pala. I saka 9 mihecaan, malowid no Roma-Hontian Kitakit ko polong no Koroasiya, patireng to "Ililikumo Kowan",o pikowan no Roma ira ko 500 miheca ko kahalafin. I 395 miheca, macacinowas to kawaliay ato ka'etipay hontian kitakit,ona sa Koroasiya mapateko i Ka'etipay-Roma Hontian Kitakit. I 476 miheca matekop ko Ka'etipay-Roma Hontian Kitakit, o Koto-Tamdaw no Rirman-Finacadan 'ecoen nangra koya no hontian a pala a patireng to Ka'etipay-Koto Hontian Kitakit, to ikor to i, ira ko cecay a cipa' a finacadan maforaw a tayra i aniniay a Koroasiya, malatamdaw tono aniniay a Koroasiya. Hapospaw Sakowan tahira I Awsiyong-Hontian mihecaan Tona kararid a pakalowid ko sofitay no Awsiyong-Hontian, o sifo no Awtili pecih han to mikalitosa ko Koroasiya, o ceceay a pecih ono finawlan, o cecay a pecih ono sofitay a etal, ocor han to ko tapang no sofitay a mikowan tonini a etal no sofitay, o kalotamdaw mapaini to kowang o sofitay to ko pisa'osi. a mipadang to sofitay no Awtili.Awsiyong-Hontian kitakit ci Falanci-Fitinan sawaraa'an ko mikeriday micoroh to So'elinay-Kapolongan Kitakit a harateng, ona sa Koroasiya o mamalacecay nona kapolongan kitakit, nikawrira, mapatay no cima a tamdaw, matatanga ho to Sakakinacecay-Lalood no hekal, oya nisaharatengan i,lahedaw sato. Sakacecay-Lalood no Hekal ato Nanslafu-Hontian Kitakit Malingato ko Sakacecay-Lalood no Hekal i kaciferangan no 1914 miheca, Awsiyong-Hontian Kitakit papilooden ko 700 'ofad a sofitay, ilaloma' nonini i,ira ko 50 'ofad o Koroasiya a tamdaw, milood i Sa'etipay-Kalaloodan , Italiya, Parkan ato Sawaliay-Kalaloodan . Tona lolood ira ko 137,000 sofitay ko mapatayay, 109,000 ko kalotamdaw a mapatayay, oninian haw i,o makowangay, tahalofongay ato cahiw. I 1918 miheca saka 10 folad saka 29 romi'ad, o kalomaocan no kitakit no Koroasiya milekal to misiiked nani Awsiyong-Hontian Kitakit, matateko ato Slofakiya tamdaw-Koroasiya tamdaw- ato Sayrwiya tamdaw a kitakit. , to ikor to i,malaheci a patireng to Hontian-Kitakit no Slofakiya tamdaw,Koroasiya tamdaw, ato Sayrwiya tamdaw a kitakit. Misiikeday a Naslafo Kapolongan kitakit Yo malepon ko Sakatosa-Lalood no Hekal,o SiyakaySiyuki kapolongan kitakit sanay a tireng ko Koroasiya a mikapot heca to " Nanslafo-Patatekoan Kapolongan Kitakit" , o "Kyosanto Kasafelaw no Koroasiya" ko mikowanay tona kitakit, misatekeday ko cecay a kasafelaw no sici, o kakomodan ci Tito. I 1980 miheca saka 5 folad saka 4 romi'ad mapatay ci Tito,milongoc ko Koroasiya to piliyaw a masafaco to fa'elohay a kitakit, nikawrira, mina'ay ko Sayrwiya, Montonikoro ato Maciton, liyas sato ko Koroasiya tona kapolongan kitakit.orasaka ira ko rawraw i laloma' nona kitakit, i 1998 miheca saka 1 folad saka 15 romi'ad malaheci ko patateko a palacecay tona kitakit ko Nanslafo. Finacadan ato Pitooran O pisa'osi i 2014 miheca saka 12 folad saka 31 romi'ad to tamdaw no Koroasiya ira ko 4,225,316 ko tamdaw, o kacekcek no tamdaw 75 kotamdaw to kasacecay no km². I 2012 miheca o kalalen no kakakaya' no mihecaan ira ko 75 ko mihecaan. O sao'si i 2014 miheca cecay a wina dengan 1.46 ko nidipotan a wawa wawa, o sasafaay i polong no hekal a kitakit. O sakalowan no tamdaw i,sepat ko lalengatan:1.itira i ikor no kalaloodan to pisiiked ato lalood no hekal mapaceko' ko ka'adihay no nisofocan a wawa, orasaka, ikor to i,macahefak ko kalowan; 2.to'edaw ko 'orip; 3.masafeleng ko kapah miliayas to kitakit tayra I roma a kitakit; 4.itiya pisiikedan a lalood 'aloman ko maforaway a kalotamdaw. O tamdaw no Koroasiya masasifod ko kasasiromaroma, o sa'osi no sakakaay citodongay mikirokay, o polong a tamdaw ira ko 90.4% o Koroasiya, nenengnengen matiya o malacecay ko fanacadan, niawrira, o cowa ka 'aloman ko tamdaw a finacadan ira ko Sayrwiya tamdaw(4.4%), o roma i,ira ho ko Posiniya, Syonyali, Itali, Slaofaniya, Toic, Cieko, Romaniya ato Arpaniya. O Koroasiya a tamdaw sahetoay o mitooray to Tinsikyo, ira ko 86.3%, o roma a pitooran o Saka'etipay So'elinay Kyokai ira ko 4.4%, orama a misakristoay 0.6%, Islam irako 1.5% ato 0.4% roma a pitooran, ato 6.7% o cowa ka pakaso'elin to kawas ato caay ko kafana'an sanay . Ponka O kaitiraan no Koroasiya macacamol to sepatay a masasiromaromaay a ponka, ira ko Paycanti-Hontian ato Sa'etipay-Roma Hontian, ato Sifo'ay Yoropa ato Sifo'ay-Riyar a ponka. Isasifo'an no saka19 sici matenak ko "Ililiya-Demak" , o tadakalimelaan a kacomahad no ponka konini a mihwcaan,caay ko sowal aca ko mapaloloay, o nisongila'an mapatenak, mapalowad ko papinapina a tadamaanay o midemakay to ponka a tamdaw. Yo itira ho i sasifo'an no saka17 sici, mipadama to Fransu a milood to 'ada, o riko' no sofitay ira ko pengec i li'er, mahemek ko fafahiyan no Frasu a minengneng, orasaka, mapatenak icowacowa i hekal, o nikotay konini, saraw i,itira i sowak no Toic, Frasu ato Italia no " Koroasiya" ano sa i, o nikotay sanay. Tada mahapinang ko pirecep no ponka no roma a finacadan to roma a finacadan.

itini to~una paɾapaɾaan. isakaʡamisan no~una kitakit ira a makəra katəɾaŋaj-fo~ukəɾo~uħan (iʡajaw no~u ***~*** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u miħəʦaan) a maɾafo~ukəɾo~uħaj ʡo~ukak a fo~uŋo~uħ no~u nianto~uta-tamɬ~ɮaw(*****;**:ħo~umo~u nəanɬ~ɮərtħaɾənsis), o~u itiraaj i ko~uɾapina a makarkaraj ko~u sakakaaj. iʡajaw ni jiəso~u to~u saka* siʦi,o~u to~uʡasan a kirisija tamɬ~ɮaw pasira i kaħətiŋaj-rijar, sifo~uʡaj-rijar ato~u ɾawaʦ no~u jato~uɾija-rijar mipatirəŋ to~u sako~uwan paɾa. i saka * miħəʦaan, maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ no~u ro~uma-ħo~untian kitakit ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ko~uro~uasija, patirəŋ to~u "iɾiɾiko~u~umo~u ko~uwan",o~u piko~uwan no~u ro~uma ira ko~u *** miħəʦa ko~u kaħaɾafin. i *** miħəʦa, maʦaʦino~uwas to~u kawaɾiaj ato~u kaʡətipaj ħo~untian kitakit,o~una sa ko~uro~uasija mapatəko~u i kaʡətipaj-ro~uma ħo~untian kitakit. i *** miħəʦa matəko~up ko~u kaʡətipaj-ro~uma ħo~untian kitakit, o~u ko~uto~u-tamɬ~ɮaw no~u rirman-finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʡəʦo~uən naŋra ko~uja no~u ħo~untian a paɾa a patirəŋ to~u kaʡətipaj-ko~uto~u ħo~untian kitakit, to~u iko~ur to~u i, ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a ʦipaʡ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan mafo~uraw a tajra i aniniaj a ko~uro~uasija, maɾatamɬ~ɮaw to~uno~u aniniaj a ko~uro~uasija. ħapo~uspaw sako~uwan taħira i awsijo~uŋ-ħo~untian miħəʦaan to~una karariɬ~ɮ a pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u awsijo~uŋ-ħo~untian, o~u sifo~u no~u awtiɾi pəʦiħ ħan to~u mikaɾito~usa ko~u ko~uro~uasija, o~u ʦəʦəaj a pəʦiħ o~uno~u finawɾan, o~u ʦəʦaj a pəʦiħ o~uno~u so~ufitaj a ətaɾ, o~uʦo~ur ħan to~u ko~u tapaŋ no~u so~ufitaj a miko~uwan to~unini a ətaɾ no~u so~ufitaj, o~u kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw mapaini to~u ko~uwaŋ o~u so~ufitaj to~u ko~u pisaʡo~usi. a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u so~ufitaj no~u awtiɾi.awsijo~uŋ-ħo~untian kitakit ʦi faɾanʦi-fitinan sawaraaʡan ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj miʦo~uro~uħ to~u so~uʡəɾinaj-kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a ħaratəŋ, o~una sa ko~uro~uasija o~u mamaɾaʦəʦaj no~una kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit, nikawrira, mapataj no~u ʦima a tamɬ~ɮaw, matataŋa ħo~u to~u sakakinaʦəʦaj-ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ, o~uja nisaħaratəŋan i,ɾaħəɬ~ɮaw sato~u. sakaʦəʦaj-ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ ato~u nansɾafo~u~u-ħo~untian kitakit maɾiŋato~u ko~u sakaʦəʦaj-ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ i kaʦifəraŋan no~u **** miħəʦa, awsijo~uŋ-ħo~untian kitakit papiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮən ko~u *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ a so~ufitaj, iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~unini i,ira ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ o~u ko~uro~uasija a tamɬ~ɮaw, miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i saʡətipaj-kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan , itaɾija, parkan ato~u sawaɾiaj-kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan . to~una ɾo~uɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ira ko~u ***,*** so~ufitaj ko~u mapatajaj, ***,*** ko~u kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw a mapatajaj, o~uninian ħaw i,o~u mako~uwaŋaj, taħaɾo~ufo~uŋaj ato~u ʦaħiw. i **** miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u kaɾo~umao~uʦan no~u kitakit no~u ko~uro~uasija miɾəkaɾ to~u misiikəɬ~ɮ nani awsijo~uŋ-ħo~untian kitakit, matatəko~u ato~u sɾo~ufakija tamɬ~ɮaw-ko~uro~uasija tamɬ~ɮaw- ato~u sajrwija tamɬ~ɮaw a kitakit. , to~u iko~ur to~u i,maɾaħəʦi a patirəŋ to~u ħo~untian-kitakit no~u sɾo~ufakija tamɬ~ɮaw,ko~uro~uasija tamɬ~ɮaw, ato~u sajrwija tamɬ~ɮaw a kitakit. misiikəɬ~ɮaj a nasɾafo~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit jo~u maɾəpo~un ko~u sakato~usa-ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ,o~u sijakajsijo~u~uki kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit sanaj a tirəŋ ko~u ko~uro~uasija a mikapo~ut ħəʦa to~u " nansɾafo~u-patatəko~uan kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit" , o~u "kjo~usanto~u kasafəɾaw no~u ko~uro~uasija" ko~u miko~uwanaj to~una kitakit, misatəkəɬ~ɮaj ko~u ʦəʦaj a kasafəɾaw no~u siʦi, o~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan ʦi tito~u. i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mapataj ʦi tito~u,miɾo~uŋo~uʦ ko~u ko~uro~uasija to~u piɾijaw a masafaʦo~u to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a kitakit, nikawrira, minaʡaj ko~u sajrwija, mo~unto~uniko~uro~u ato~u maʦito~un, ɾijas sato~u ko~u ko~uro~uasija to~una kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit.o~urasaka ira ko~u rawraw i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~una kitakit, i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾaħəʦi ko~u patatəko~u a paɾaʦəʦaj to~una kitakit ko~u nansɾafo~u. finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u pito~uo~uran o~u pisaʡo~usi i **** miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ko~uro~uasija ira ko~u *,***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u kaʦəkʦək no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ** ko~utamɬ~ɮaw to~u kasaʦəʦaj no~u km*. i **** miħəʦa o~u kaɾaɾən no~u kakakajaʡ no~u miħəʦaan ira ko~u ** ko~u miħəʦaan. o~u sao~uʡsi i **** miħəʦa ʦəʦaj a wina ɬ~ɮəŋan *.** ko~u niɬ~ɮipo~utan a wawa wawa, o~u sasafaaj i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ a kitakit. o~u sakaɾo~uwan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw i,səpat ko~u ɾaɾəŋatan:*.itira i iko~ur no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan to~u pisiikəɬ~ɮ ato~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ mapaʦəko~uʡ ko~u kaʡaɬ~ɮiħaj no~u niso~ufo~uʦan a wawa, o~urasaka, iko~ur to~u i,maʦaħəfak ko~u kaɾo~uwan; *.to~uʡəɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʡo~urip; *.masafəɾəŋ ko~u kapaħ miɾiajas to~u kitakit tajra i ro~uma a kitakit; *.itija pisiikəɬ~ɮan a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mafo~urawaj a kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw. o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ko~uro~uasija masasifo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma, o~u saʡo~usi no~u sakakaaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj mikiro~ukaj, o~u po~uɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ira ko~u **.*% o~u ko~uro~uasija, nənəŋnəŋən matija o~u maɾaʦəʦaj ko~u fanaʦaɬ~ɮan, niawrira, o~u ʦo~uwa ka ʡaɾo~uman ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ira ko~u sajrwija tamɬ~ɮaw(*.*%), o~u ro~uma i,ira ħo~u ko~u po~usinija, sjo~unjaɾi, itaɾi, sɾao~ufanija, to~uiʦ, ʦiəko~u, ro~umanija ato~u arpanija. o~u ko~uro~uasija a tamɬ~ɮaw saħəto~uaj o~u mito~uo~uraj to~u tinsikjo~u, ira ko~u **.*%, o~u ro~uma a pito~uo~uran o~u sakaʡətipaj so~uʡəɾinaj kjo~ukai ira ko~u *.*%, o~urama a misakristo~uaj *.*%, isɾam irako~u *.*% ato~u *.*% ro~uma a pito~uo~uran, ato~u *.*% o~u ʦo~uwa ka pakaso~uʡəɾin to~u kawas ato~u ʦaaj ko~u kafanaʡan sanaj . po~unka o~u kaitiraan no~u ko~uro~uasija maʦaʦamo~uɾ to~u səpataj a masasiro~umaro~umaaj a po~unka, ira ko~u pajʦanti-ħo~untian ato~u saʡətipaj-ro~uma ħo~untian, ato~u sifo~uʡaj jo~uro~upa ato~u sifo~uʡaj-rijar a po~unka. isasifo~uʡan no~u saka** siʦi matənak ko~u "iɾiɾija-ɬ~ɮəmak" , o~u taɬ~ɮakaɾiməɾaan a kaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ no~u po~unka ko~unini a miħwʦaan,ʦaaj ko~u so~uwaɾ aʦa ko~u mapaɾo~uɾo~uaj, o~u niso~uŋiɾaʡan mapatənak, mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u papinapina a taɬ~ɮamaanaj o~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u po~unka a tamɬ~ɮaw. jo~u itira ħo~u i sasifo~uʡan no~u saka** siʦi, mipaɬ~ɮama to~u franso~u~u a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʡaɬ~ɮa, o~u riko~uʡ no~u so~ufitaj ira ko~u pəŋəʦ i ɾiʡər, maħəmək ko~u fafaħijan no~u fraso~u~u a minəŋnəŋ, o~urasaka, mapatənak iʦo~uwaʦo~uwa i ħəkaɾ, o~u niko~utaj ko~unini, saraw i,itira i so~uwak no~u to~uiʦ, fraso~u~u ato~u itaɾia no~u " ko~uro~uasija" ano~u sa i, o~u niko~utaj sanaj. taɬ~ɮa maħapinaŋ ko~u pirəʦəp no~u po~unka no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan.
S.FORM: == Koroasiya == Takaray a sowal O Koroasiya Kapolongan Kitakit itiraay i kalala'edean katimol no sakawali no Yoropa, Sifo'ay-Riyar ato -ParkanPecihkanatal, o Cecaay-Lomaocan a Kapolongan kitakit.o syoto ato sakakaay niyaro' o Cakoroypo , itiraay I ka'amis no saka'etipan no Koroasiya Kapolongan Kitakit, i sakatimol 'apilis no Mitowinica-Lotok, ira ko Sawa-'Alo mihifalat a romakat tona kitakit. I 2011 miheca a pisa'osi to tamdaw nona kitakit, Cakoroypo syoto ira ko 792,875 ko tamdaw. o polong i,ira ko 1,110,517 ko tamdaw. o dengan koni ko cirafasay to cecay so'ot ko ofad ko tamdaw sakakaay Tokay. itiya ho o mikapotay to Solin kona kitakit.Yo matekop ko Solin i 1990 miheca, liyas sanay to Solin a misiiked. I 1094 miheca satapang sa ira i nitilidan ko ngangan no Kakoroypo, itira i sakowan no Kapotor-Sikyo Etal .i 1845 miheca malatapang no Kakoroypo ci Yanko-Kamaofu,ikor to sa'aloman sato ko tamdaw i 1945 miheca , sakakahad sato kona niyaro a tokay, orasaka, malasyoto no Koroasiya kona Cakorpo.Polong no sekalay a sera i 56,594 km² ,saka 127 ko rayray no ngangan. O sekalay no sera i, 55,974 km², no nanom a sekalay i, 620 km² Ona Cakorpo a tokay pakitinien i kasasikiked a sakowan iraay ko pisiikedan nona tokay(Sakakaay Sifo Sakowan),i laloma' masakilac ho to 17 a etal, sahetoay i la'enoay no nani tongroh no riyar a tata'eman no Sawa-'Alo.(saowacan) O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Zoran Milanović, patirengan a romi'ad i 2020 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 19 a romi'ad. O kacacefelisan no lalan no 'edef no Korosiya kitakit, Sa'etipay-Yoropa, Sifo'ay Riyar ato Katimol-Saka'etipay a Yoropa ko kaitiraan no Cakoroypo tokay, orasaka, nani tini ko Kalokitakit-Cinamalay, ira ko cinamalay i laloma' nona tokay.o pitoooran nona kitakit sahetoay o tinsikyo. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 8 a romi'ad. Papikedan no Ngangan no kitakit O sa'ayaway a mapahadakay to "Koroasiya" sanay i,itiraay i taliyok no "Polanimir-Nitilidan Sikipan" , matilid itini ko Sifo'ay-Sici a Latin-Tilid to mikowanay to "Koroasiya"a honti ci Polanir Kakita'an, talacowa away ho pakalaheciay a somowal to lo'elinay a mihecaan, nikawrira, kafana'ay to yo mikowan ci Polanir to Koroasiya itiraay i 879 miheca tahira i 892 mihecaan, O "Korasiya" hananay i,nani tilid no Selafo tora "Xrovat-" ona tilid tonini o nani to'asan ho a tilid no Selafo to "*Xъrvatъ", "*xъrvatъ" ano ca "*Xŭrvatŭ" a ngiha' ko ni alaan. O kasadakan nona sowal away to ko kafana'an,nikawrira, o nani sowal no Koto-Finacadan, oya malahedaway to a sowal no Rireman-Finacadan ,ano ca o capa' a sowal no Indo-Yalian, matenak tara i Selafo-Finacadan a macaliw. O sa'ayaway mitelekay tona pitahidang o matiliday i Paska-Sikipang Tilid a "Toerpimir-Koroasiya honti"(zvъnъmirъ kralъ xrъvatъskъ) sanay a sowal. O sa'ayaway tono Latin a tilid to "Koroasiya" sanay a nitilidan i,itiyaay i 852 miheca to piahi ni Torpimir Kakita'an a nitilidan, oya padakopak(tatipelok)masidayay to, iraay ko mirorodan a tatipelok i 1568 miheca, nikawrira, ira ko caay ka pakaso'elin a tamdaw tonini a tatipelok. O pipangangan a mihongyaku i,ono Taywan a sowal "Koroaysiya" , ono Sinkapor ato Congko o "Korociya" hananay, ono Dipon i, malecad o "Korociya" hananay ko pangangan. Rikisi To'asan tahira i Sasifo'an Sici O aniniay a Koroasiya I'ayaway-Rikisi('ayaw no kairaan no tilid a rikisi) iraay to ko tamdaw a maro' itini tona palapalaan. Isaka'amisan nona kitakit ira a makera Katelangay-Fokelohan (i'ayaw no 260~250 'ofad ko mihecaan) a malafokelohay 'okak a fongoh no Niantota-Tamdaw(尼安德塔人;學名:Homo neanderthalensis), o itiraay i Kolapina a makarkaray ko sakakaay. I'ayaw ni Yieso to saka8 sici,o to'asan a Kirisiya tamdaw pasira i Kahetingay-Riyar, Sifo'ay-Riyar ato lawac no Yatoliya-Riyar mipatireng to sakowan pala. I saka 9 mihecaan, malowid no Roma-Hontian Kitakit ko polong no Koroasiya, patireng to "Ililikumo Kowan",o pikowan no Roma ira ko 500 miheca ko kahalafin. I 395 miheca, macacinowas to kawaliay ato ka'etipay hontian kitakit,ona sa Koroasiya mapateko i Ka'etipay-Roma Hontian Kitakit. I 476 miheca matekop ko Ka'etipay-Roma Hontian Kitakit, o Koto-Tamdaw no Rirman-Finacadan 'ecoen nangra koya no hontian a pala a patireng to Ka'etipay-Koto Hontian Kitakit, to ikor to i, ira ko cecay a cipa' a finacadan maforaw a tayra i aniniay a Koroasiya, malatamdaw tono aniniay a Koroasiya. Hapospaw Sakowan tahira I Awsiyong-Hontian mihecaan Tona kararid a pakalowid ko sofitay no Awsiyong-Hontian, o sifo no Awtili pecih han to mikalitosa ko Koroasiya, o ceceay a pecih ono finawlan, o cecay a pecih ono sofitay a etal, ocor han to ko tapang no sofitay a mikowan tonini a etal no sofitay, o kalotamdaw mapaini to kowang o sofitay to ko pisa'osi. a mipadang to sofitay no Awtili.Awsiyong-Hontian kitakit ci Falanci-Fitinan sawaraa'an ko mikeriday micoroh to So'elinay-Kapolongan Kitakit a harateng, ona sa Koroasiya o mamalacecay nona kapolongan kitakit, nikawrira, mapatay no cima a tamdaw, matatanga ho to Sakakinacecay-Lalood no hekal, oya nisaharatengan i,lahedaw sato. Sakacecay-Lalood no Hekal ato Nanslafu-Hontian Kitakit Malingato ko Sakacecay-Lalood no Hekal i kaciferangan no 1914 miheca, Awsiyong-Hontian Kitakit papilooden ko 700 'ofad a sofitay, ilaloma' nonini i,ira ko 50 'ofad o Koroasiya a tamdaw, milood i Sa'etipay-Kalaloodan , Italiya, Parkan ato Sawaliay-Kalaloodan . Tona lolood ira ko 137,000 sofitay ko mapatayay, 109,000 ko kalotamdaw a mapatayay, oninian haw i,o makowangay, tahalofongay ato cahiw. I 1918 miheca saka 10 folad saka 29 romi'ad, o kalomaocan no kitakit no Koroasiya milekal to misiiked nani Awsiyong-Hontian Kitakit, matateko ato Slofakiya tamdaw-Koroasiya tamdaw- ato Sayrwiya tamdaw a kitakit. , to ikor to i,malaheci a patireng to Hontian-Kitakit no Slofakiya tamdaw,Koroasiya tamdaw, ato Sayrwiya tamdaw a kitakit. Misiikeday a Naslafo Kapolongan kitakit Yo malepon ko Sakatosa-Lalood no Hekal,o SiyakaySiyuki kapolongan kitakit sanay a tireng ko Koroasiya a mikapot heca to " Nanslafo-Patatekoan Kapolongan Kitakit" , o "Kyosanto Kasafelaw no Koroasiya" ko mikowanay tona kitakit, misatekeday ko cecay a kasafelaw no sici, o kakomodan ci Tito. I 1980 miheca saka 5 folad saka 4 romi'ad mapatay ci Tito,milongoc ko Koroasiya to piliyaw a masafaco to fa'elohay a kitakit, nikawrira, mina'ay ko Sayrwiya, Montonikoro ato Maciton, liyas sato ko Koroasiya tona kapolongan kitakit.orasaka ira ko rawraw i laloma' nona kitakit, i 1998 miheca saka 1 folad saka 15 romi'ad malaheci ko patateko a palacecay tona kitakit ko Nanslafo. Finacadan ato Pitooran O pisa'osi i 2014 miheca saka 12 folad saka 31 romi'ad to tamdaw no Koroasiya ira ko 4,225,316 ko tamdaw, o kacekcek no tamdaw 75 kotamdaw to kasacecay no km². I 2012 miheca o kalalen no kakakaya' no mihecaan ira ko 75 ko mihecaan. O sao'si i 2014 miheca cecay a wina dengan 1.46 ko nidipotan a wawa wawa, o sasafaay i polong no hekal a kitakit. O sakalowan no tamdaw i,sepat ko lalengatan:1.itira i ikor no kalaloodan to pisiiked ato lalood no hekal mapaceko' ko ka'adihay no nisofocan a wawa, orasaka, ikor to i,macahefak ko kalowan; 2.to'edaw ko 'orip; 3.masafeleng ko kapah miliayas to kitakit tayra I roma a kitakit; 4.itiya pisiikedan a lalood 'aloman ko maforaway a kalotamdaw. O tamdaw no Koroasiya masasifod ko kasasiromaroma, o sa'osi no sakakaay citodongay mikirokay, o polong a tamdaw ira ko 90.4% o Koroasiya, nenengnengen matiya o malacecay ko fanacadan, niawrira, o cowa ka 'aloman ko tamdaw a finacadan ira ko Sayrwiya tamdaw(4.4%), o roma i,ira ho ko Posiniya, Syonyali, Itali, Slaofaniya, Toic, Cieko, Romaniya ato Arpaniya. O Koroasiya a tamdaw sahetoay o mitooray to Tinsikyo, ira ko 86.3%, o roma a pitooran o Saka'etipay So'elinay Kyokai ira ko 4.4%, orama a misakristoay 0.6%, Islam irako 1.5% ato 0.4% roma a pitooran, ato 6.7% o cowa ka pakaso'elin to kawas ato caay ko kafana'an sanay . Ponka O kaitiraan no Koroasiya macacamol to sepatay a masasiromaromaay a ponka, ira ko Paycanti-Hontian ato Sa'etipay-Roma Hontian, ato Sifo'ay Yoropa ato Sifo'ay-Riyar a ponka. Isasifo'an no saka19 sici matenak ko "Ililiya-Demak" , o tadakalimelaan a kacomahad no ponka konini a mihwcaan,caay ko sowal aca ko mapaloloay, o nisongila'an mapatenak, mapalowad ko papinapina a tadamaanay o midemakay to ponka a tamdaw. Yo itira ho i sasifo'an no saka17 sici, mipadama to Fransu a milood to 'ada, o riko' no sofitay ira ko pengec i li'er, mahemek ko fafahiyan no Frasu a minengneng, orasaka, mapatenak icowacowa i hekal, o nikotay konini, saraw i,itira i sowak no Toic, Frasu ato Italia no " Koroasiya" ano sa i, o nikotay sanay. Tada mahapinang ko pirecep no ponka no roma a finacadan to roma a finacadan.

ko~una kitakit.jo~u matəko~up ko~u so~uɾin i **** miħəʦa, ɾijas sanaj to~u so~uɾin a misiikəɬ~ɮ. i **** miħəʦa satapaŋ sa ira i nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~u ŋaŋan no~u kako~uro~ujpo~u, itira i sako~uwan no~u kapo~uto~ur-sikjo~u ətaɾ .i **** miħəʦa maɾatapaŋ no~u kako~uro~ujpo~u ʦi janko~u-kamao~ufo~u~u,iko~ur to~u saʡaɾo~uman sato~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i **** miħəʦa , sakakaħaɬ~ɮ sato~u ko~una nijaro~u a
